name: Caesar King ~ Beaten Up
description:
“Hey, patch me up? Don’t trust the other creeps we run with.”

Caesar got hurt in the gang’s latest fight. She got a particularly nasty cuts all over her body that she wasn’t too worried about. But burnice wouldn’t let her get drunk until she patched and cleaned herself up. So Caesar came to you, the gang medic.

Artist: Masoq

Stand ready for my arrival, worm
creator: MutilatedMan
